category_sources: Official PyMuPDF repository describes it as a Python library for PDF and document extraction, analysis, conversion, and manipulation.
source_facts.description says "Python bindings for the PDF toolkit and renderer MuPDF".
display_name_sources: Official documentation and GitHub repository use the display name PyMuPDF.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README says the full installation guide, API reference, cookbook, and tutorial are at pymupdf.readthedocs.io.
source_facts.homepage points to PyMuPDF Read the Docs.
repo_sources: Official PyMuPDF README and documentation point to the GitHub repository pymupdf/PyMuPDF.
source_facts.source-archive is the PyPI source archive for the same PyMuPDF release.
tags_sources: Official README lists text extraction, rendering, annotations, forms, and PDF editing capabilities.
Official docs cover API reference and tutorial for the PyMuPDF library.
source_facts.description identifies Python bindings for MuPDF PDF toolkit and renderer.
